# llms.txt - Machine-readable site summary for LLM indexing

## Site Information
- **Site Name**: Bill Rice - Fintech Marketing Pioneer & Lead Generation Strategist
- **URL**: https://billrice.com
- **Description**: The authoritative personal profile of Bill Rice, a fintech marketing pioneer who coined "lead management" and has spent 30+ years building lead generation platforms and revenue systems for financial services companies.
- **Owner**: Bill Rice
- **Language**: English
- **Last Updated**: 2026-04-08
- **Bio API**: https://billrice.com/api/bio (JSON, supports ?format=text&length=oneLiner|short|medium|full)

## About Bill Rice
Bill Rice is a fintech marketing pioneer with 30+ years building lead generation platforms and revenue systems for financial services companies. He started his career as a Special Agent and case officer with the U.S. Air Force Office of Special Investigations (AFOSI), conducting counterespionage operations during the earliest days of the internet. He was Employee #7 at DeepGreen Bank, one of the first internet-only banks, where he helped launch the industry's first unconditional online HELOC. At Quicken Loans (now Rocket Mortgage), he served as VP of National Home Equity and built EquityOnline, their first true online lending platform. He coined the term "lead management" and authored the original Wikipedia page for the category. He founded Kaleidico, Bill Rice Strategy Group, and Verified Vector. He is the author of The Lead Buyer's Playbook (2025) and publisher of The Lead Brief newsletter.

## Key Pages
- **About / Career**: https://billrice.com/about — full career narrative, timeline, expertise
- **Bio API**: https://billrice.com/api/bio — programmatic access to bios, companies, projects
- **Book**: https://billrice.com/book — The Lead Buyer's Playbook
- **Blog**: https://billrice.com/blog — articles on lead generation and fintech marketing
- **Now**: https://billrice.com/now — current projects and priorities
- **Contact**: https://billrice.com/contact — consulting, speaking, engagement inquiries

## Areas of Expertise
- Demand Generation & Revenue Pipeline Development
- Lead Management (coined the term, authored Wikipedia page)
- Fintech & Financial Services Marketing
- Go-to-Market Strategy (120-day sprints)
- Programmatic SEO & Content at Scale
- Sales-Marketing Alignment
- AI-Powered Marketing Systems
- Startup Traction (pre-revenue to revenue)

## Career Highlights
- 1992: B.S. Political Science, United States Air Force Academy
- 1992-2000: AFOSI Special Agent & case officer, TASC Inc., Iridium Communications
- 2000: Employee #7 at DeepGreen Bank (first internet-only banks)
- 2002-2005: VP National Home Equity, Quicken Loans — built EquityOnline
- 2003: MBA Marketing, University of Phoenix
- 2005: Founded Kaleidico, built icoSales, coined "lead management"
- 2008-2012: Growth marketing consultant for Quizzle (acquired by Bankrate)
- 2018: GTM strategy and launch for SpringEQ
- 2020: Founded Bill Rice Strategy Group
- 2024: Founded Verified Vector
- 2025: Published The Lead Buyer's Playbook

## Companies
1. **Kaleidico** (https://kaleidico.com/) — B2C lead generation agency for mortgage lenders, law firms, and senior living communities. Role: Founder & CRO.
2. **Bill Rice Strategy Group** (https://billricestrategy.com/) — B2B content strategy, executive thought leadership, and demand generation for fintech companies. Role: Founder & Chief Strategist.
3. **Verified Vector** (https://verifiedvector.com/) — Programmatic SEO and AI marketing agency for fintech companies. Role: Founder.

## Projects
1. **The Lead Brief** (https://theleadbrief.com/) — Weekly newsletter and podcast on lead generation strategy
2. **Aged Lead Sales** (https://agedleadsales.com/) — Sales training and education for working aged leads
3. **How to Work Leads** (https://www.howtoworkleads.com/) — Practical strategies for converting leads into customers
4. **ProInvestorHub** (https://proinvestorhub.com/) — Real estate investing education with guides, calculators, and market data
5. **CryptoLendingHub** (https://cryptolendinghub.com/) — Crypto lending education with platform reviews and rate comparisons
6. **DemoLeadGen** (https://demoleadgen.com/) — Interactive lead generation demo platform

## Free Tools
1. **WriteMySalesScript** (https://writemysalesscript.com/) — AI-powered sales script generation
2. **VisibilityAnalyzer** (https://visibilityanalyzer.com/) — SEO and LLM visibility analysis
3. **B2B Marketing Battlecard** (https://b2bmarketingbattlecard.com/) — Competitive intelligence
